sources.name: Crossroad Mobility Aid Users
sources.notes: Use as the primary source for wheelchair, walker, crutch, and cane user boxes.

sources.name: PMMA
sources.role: Mobility-aid video dataset for temporal behavior and clip evaluation
sources.access: Official GitHub repo plus linked data assets
sources.license_note: Verify the official PMMA data terms before redistribution
sources.notes: Use for clip-based review, video sequences, and mobility-aid temporal behavior.

sources.name: CrowdHuman
sources.role: Crowded person detection and occlusion robustness
sources.license_note: Official site states non-commercial research / educational usage
sources.notes: Use only for the person class, not mobility-aid classes.

sources.name: MOT17
sources.license_note: Follow MOTChallenge terms and citation requirements
sources.notes: Keep whole sequences intact; never split individual frames across splits.

sources.name: Market-1501
sources.license_note: Follow the official dataset terms and citation guidance
sources.notes: Use unchanged for ReID pretraining, with only metadata files added if needed.
